documented_hotspots.reason: The historical detailed readiness assembly remains contract-compatible but executes inside a bounded query context and timeout.
Source assembly used during explicit assessment creation remains a bounded-migration follow-up; user-facing list and readiness paths use governed repositories.
Airline source graph assembly remains a bounded-migration follow-up; dashboards and release lists use governed global repositories.
Explicit user-triggered idempotent synchronization still reads several tenant-scoped source collections; the queue list itself is governed and bounded.
